title: How Do I Compete With Super Low Prices？ | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: How Do I Compete With Super Low Prices？ ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: So one of the most common questions we get particularly when people first start out is how do i compete with these super low prices [Music] what's happening is you're trying to set up your business somewhere in your little circle it could be on instagram could be in a shop window…

segments.text: so one of the most common questions we get particularly when people first start out is how do i compete with these super low prices [Music] what's happening is you're trying to set up your business somewhere in your little circle it could be on instagram could be in a shop window you see someone advertising the same thing it appears as you sell but for a ridiculously cheap price so the answer to the question how do you compete with low prices from my perspective is you shouldn't compete for on price is only one of three broad ways that you compete for business you're either the most convenient that's kind of what amazon's killing at if you think about what they do they're no longer the cheapest but they are the most convenient and that's why we all use them and you are the best in a particular niche which i'm going to come back to or you're the cheapest the downside with trying to be the cheapest well the first thing is you get paid less for every procedure that's a really significant downside that people don't seem to understand we're actually not i'm not interested in who's got the most

patience i'm much more interested in running a profitable business and who's the busiest i would rather be less busy and more profitable so the first thing is to change your mindset around trying to get patients because if you get a patient who doesn't basically pay you any money they're actually a liability so this is why i'm trying to compete for the cheapest isn't necessarily the right thing to do the second thing about that strategy of trying to compete to be the cheapest is there's only one position in your local neighborhood for the cheapest and everyone else is second cheapest and if you're second cheapest but you're competing to be the cheapest well you've lost and you're not getting paid much so it makes way more sense to compete to be the best in a particular niche and that can be whatever niche you like but um i always use the example because it's kind of unusual of a guy i know who does really well treating middle eastern men he if you're a middle eastern man who wants a discreet home visit man to man then he's the one who does it for you and he's very well known in those circles um he doesn't even have to use instagram and facebook and all those kind of

marketing platforms because he's got a niche that he is dominant in the biggest user of volbella in the whole country is a guy who does um penis enlargements with volbella so that's not a niche i'm interested in competing in it's not really the kind of thing that floats my boat but he's killing it so that's his niche so this is he doesn't have to worry about what i'm charging for because i'm not even going to do that procedure and he's doing it in his own way he's dominating in that particular niche so this is what i suggest you do is you find out you find some way that you can be number one in a category now the categories are multi-dimensional so you could be the best person to do you know lip filler in your particular neighborhood might be the thing a lot of people compete heavily on lips you need to get very good at lips though and you need to take really great pictures of lips and i've seen some people do really well and set up really stonking the great businesses off the back of dominating a particular niche and i can think of one off the top of head you might want to have a look shout out to lisa roberts she trained with us

years ago and she has done so well with her business and just have a look at that instagram feed if you're looking for a lip treatment and you're that her demographic she is very convincing which is why she's doing so well so this is dominating in a particular niche um but trying to be the cheapest sole destroying niche to compete in you have to cut corners you have to reduce products you're always looking for cheaper stuff you're always talking about price and guess what all your patients come in and they will talk about price too and they want to know if you can give them another discount because you're attracting all the people who care about price primarily and i don't judge them we've all been that person i've often looked for the cheapest thing i can buy um usually you regret it so we're all that person some of the time but you don't have to compete for that person you just need to compete with someone who really cares about something that you can deliver for them so there are many ways um ask yourself what would inspire you to get better and better at because i'm pretty sure it's not cutting corners so that's what i recommend you doing become the best in a particular
niche and don't compete on price
